name: Constellation Technologies Limited
summary: Constellation Technologies Limited develops and manages Internet of Things (IoT) products for industry and government applications in Australia. The company's solutions cover cloud, IoT, edge-computing sensors, big data, analytics, machine learning, artificial intelligence, and other technologies. It offers temperature and humidity monitors, sensors, RTD (temperature) and PH value probes, and gateways and interfaces, as well as operations management suites. The company also serves customers in the United States, India, the Middle East, and China. Constellation Technologies Limited was incorporated in 1987 and is based in Melbourne, Australia.
